name: part_010
file: tmp_【3D BIRTHDAY LIVE】 Lovin' you to the point I'm 𝓒𝓡𝓐𝓩𝓨 ♡ #KoishiteruZOMBIE  【Kureiji Ollie】 [eYLNO0v7ylg]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_010.webm

scenes.description: Outro sequence with music and staff credits appearing on screen.
Kureiji Ollie addresses the viewers, speaking in English and Japanese with Indonesian subtitles on screen.

subtitles.english: Vessel Life LLC

subtitles.original: Mchan, ID team
subtitles.english: Mchan, ID team

subtitles.original:
And of course,
MY BELOVED ZOMRADES & ZOMILY!! ♡
subtitles.english:
And of course,
MY BELOVED ZOMRADES & ZOMILY!! ♡

subtitles.original: Thank you so much for coming to watch the 3D Birthday Live! 3Dライブを見てくれてありがとう！
subtitles.english: Thank you so much for coming to watch the 3D Birthday Live! Thank you for watching the 3D live!

subtitles.original: How was it? Did you feel my love? オリーの愛、ちゃんと届いたかな？
subtitles.english: How was it? Did you feel my love? I wonder if Ollie's love reached you properly?

subtitles.original: Oh, look at that! It's the specially prepared bedroom. Cute, isn't it? そう！特別に用意したお部屋、可愛かったでしょ？
subtitles.english: Oh, look at that! It's the specially prepared bedroom. Cute, isn't it? That's right! The specially prepared room was cute, right?

subtitles.original: It has a bed, a sofa, Udin, and... ベッドやソファ、それにウディンもいたし...
subtitles.english: It has a bed, a sofa, Udin, and... There was a bed, a sofa, and even Udin...

subtitles.original: I don't know if you noticed, but... 気づいたかな？
subtitles.english: I don't know if you noticed, but... I wonder if you noticed?

subtitles.original: ...there was a display photo of the people I cherish the most in there. Did you catch it? オリーが大事にしてる人たちの写真も飾ってあったんだよー！
subtitles.english: ...there was a display photo of the people I cherish the most in there. Did you catch it? Photos of the people Ollie cherishes were on display too!

subtitles.original: I think the neon stage was really cool too! ネオンステージもかっこよかったでしょ！
subtitles.english: I think the neon stage was really cool too! The neon stage was cool too, right?

subtitles.original: You probably spotted a bunch of TVs sitting around. テレビがいっぱい並んでたの、見えた？
subtitles.english: You probably spotted a bunch of TVs sitting around. Did you see all the TVs lined up?

subtitles.original: And well, those are there to help me watch you from afar~ あれね、オリーが君のことを遠くから見られるように置いてあったんだよ～
subtitles.english: And well, those are there to help me watch you from afar~ You know, those were placed there so Ollie can watch you from a distance~

subtitles.original: Cool, right? すごいでしょ？
subtitles.english: Cool, right? Amazing, right?

subtitles.original: Uh, but come to think of it, I really did drag you around the stages, huh? あ...でも、何回も連れ回しちゃったね
subtitles.english: Uh, but come to think of it, I really did drag you around the stages, huh? Ah... but I did drag you around many times, didn't I?

subtitles.original: Um, how are you? Do you feel sick? Are you okay? 大丈夫？疲れてない？
subtitles.english: Um, how are you? Do you feel sick? Are you okay? Are you okay? You're not tired?

subtitles.original: Ollie's a bit worried, but I think it shouldn't affect you too much since I carried you while you were still sleeping... あー...まぁ、寝てる間に運んだから、問題ないかなって思うけど...
subtitles.english: Ollie's a bit worried, but I think it shouldn't affect you too much since I carried you while you were still sleeping... Ah... well, since I carried you while you were sleeping, I think it's okay...

subtitles.original: Hah? What? No, nothing! あ！
subtitles.english: Hah? What? No, nothing! Ah!

subtitles.original: I didn't say anything! Hehe. そういえば！
subtitles.english: I didn't say anything! Hehe. Speaking of which!

subtitles.original: Um, speaking of you, you kept running and hiding away from me! なんか途中で怖がって離れたり、逃げたりしてたでしょ〜？
subtitles.english: Um, speaking of you, you kept running and hiding away from me! You were being scared and pulling away, or running away in the middle, weren't you~?

subtitles.original: Naughty, naughty! Tsk, tsk! ふふ、悪い子なんだから〜！
subtitles.english: Naughty, naughty! Tsk, tsk! Hehe, you naughty child~!

subtitles.original: You always leave comments and like every post I make, so I thought you'd like it if I came to visit! いつもコメントしたり、いいねしてくれたりするから、会いに来てあげたんだよ！
subtitles.english: You always leave comments and like every post I make, so I thought you'd like it if I came to visit! Since you always comment and give likes, I came to visit you!

subtitles.original: I didn't think you would actually surprise you that much. そんなに驚かせちゃうとは思わなかったよ
subtitles.english: I didn't think you would actually surprise you that much. I didn't think I would surprise you that much.

subtitles.original: Um, I think maybe it was because you were too surprised when I suddenly appeared in front of you?? 急に目の前に現れたから、びっくりしすぎちゃったのかな？？
subtitles.english: Um, I think maybe it was because you were too surprised when I suddenly appeared in front of you?? I wonder if it's because I appeared in front of you so suddenly that you got too surprised??

subtitles.original: But just so you know, I worked really hard, just for you~ オリーはね、君のためにたくさん頑張ったんだよ〜
subtitles.english: But just so you know, I worked really hard, just for you~ You know, Ollie worked really hard for you~

subtitles.original: I practiced my singing, I sang a lot, and changed my outfit so many times! 衣装を着替えたり、歌の練習もたくさんしたの！
subtitles.english: I practiced my singing, I sang a lot, and changed my outfit so many times! I changed outfits and practiced singing a lot!

subtitles.original: I wonder if my feelings reached you? オリーの想い、ちゃんと届いたかな？
subtitles.english: I wonder if my feelings reached you? I wonder if Ollie's feelings reached you properly?

subtitles.original: It obviously did, right? 届いたよね？？
subtitles.english: It obviously did, right? They did, right??

subtitles.original: Also, at the end, I finally managed to catch you! 最後はやっと君を捕まえちゃった！
subtitles.english: Also, at the end, I finally managed to catch you! In the end, I finally caught you!

subtitles.original: That's what you hoped for, right? それって君も望んでたんでしょ？
subtitles.english: That's what you hoped for, right? That's what you were wishing for too, right?

subtitles.original: I mean, 'cause you were running away from me... because you love me a lot, obviously you were expecting it too, right? だってずっと逃げてたんだもん！オリーのことが大好きだから、そうなるとわかってたんだよね？
subtitles.english: I mean, 'cause you were running away from me... because you love me a lot, obviously you were expecting it too, right? Because you kept running away! Since you love Ollie so much, you knew it would end up like this, right?

subtitles.original: ...hehe, period! うんうん！やっぱりそうだよね！
subtitles.english: ...hehe, period! Yeah, yeah! I knew it!

subtitles.original: Anyway, for those of you who are still watching, thank you by the way. I have an announcement! じゃあ、まだ見てくれてるみんなにお知らせだよ！
subtitles.english: Anyway, for those of you who are still watching, thank you by the way. I have an announcement! Well, here's an announcement for everyone still watching!

subtitles.original: I'll be featured in SO87's song, 'Love Me Back', with the music video! SO87の新曲「Love Me Back」に出演して、なんとMVも出ちゃいます！
subtitles.english: I'll be featured in SO87's song, 'Love Me Back', with the music video! I'll be appearing in SO87's new song "Love Me Back", and I'm even in the MV!

subtitles.original: It's going to be so cool, so keep an eye out, okay? すっごくかっこいいから、みんなちゃんとチェックしてね〜！
subtitles.english: It's going to be so cool, so keep an eye out, okay? It's really cool, so everyone please check it out~!

subtitles.original: It's just so exciting, isn't it? ワクワクするでしょ〜？
subtitles.english: It's just so exciting, isn't it? It's exciting, right~?

subtitles.original: If you ever feel the need to feel my love again... もしまたオリーの「愛」を感じたくなったら
subtitles.english: If you ever feel the need to feel my love again... If you ever want to feel Ollie's "love" again

subtitles.original: ...then don't hesitate and please come back to watch the 3D Birthday Live again, okay? いつでも3D生配信を見に来てね！
subtitles.english: ...then don't hesitate and please come back to watch the 3D Birthday Live again, okay? Come and watch the 3D live stream anytime!

subtitles.original: I'll always be here, waiting for you~ オリーはずーっとここで待ってるんだから〜！
subtitles.english: I'll always be here, waiting for you~ Because Ollie will be waiting here for you forever~!

subtitles.original: Anyways, bye-bye! バイバイ！
subtitles.english: Anyways, bye-bye! Bye bye!

subtitles.original: Otsucrazy~! おつクレイジー！
subtitles.english: Otsucrazy~! Otsucrazy!
